_meta.note: Values are display strings. Keys are typed codes from prana-api errors.py + messages.py. To add a language copy this file, rename to <locale>.json, translate values only — never change keys.

error.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Account locked due to too many failed attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes.
error.ACCOUNT_INACTIVE: This account is inactive. Contact your administrator.
error.ACCOUNT_NOT_ACTIVE: Your account is not active yet.
error.INVALID_TOTP: Incorrect authenticator code. Please try again.
error.INVALID_TOTP_CODE: Incorrect OTP code. Please try again.
error.TOTP_NOT_CONFIGURED: Two-factor authentication is not set up on this account.
error.TOTP_INIT_REQUIRED: Please complete two-factor authentication setup first.
error.STEP_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Session timed out. Please start the login again.
error.MISSING_STEP_TOKEN: Session data missing. Please start the login again.
error.SETUP_TOKEN_EXPIRED: This setup link has expired. Request a new one.
error.NO_REFRESH_TOKEN: Session expired. Please log in again.
error.REFRESH_INVALID: Session is no longer valid. Please log in again.
error.USER_NOT_FOUND: No account found with these details.
error.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least {min} characters.
error.ALREADY_REVOKED: This session has already been signed out.
error.MISSING_AUTH: You must be signed in to access this.
error.OA_ADMIN_REQUIRED: This action requires an OA Admin role.
error.OA_ADMIN_ROLE_REQUIRED: This action requires an OA Admin role.
error.PORTAL_ADMIN_REQUIRED: This action requires a Portal Admin role.
error.INTERNAL_ONLY: This endpoint is not publicly accessible.
error.ELEVATION_REQUIRED: Elevated access is required for this action.
error.INSUFFICIENT_ROLE: You don't have permission to do this.
error.ALREADY_ACTIVATED: This organisation has already been activated.
error.OVERRIDE_REASON_REQUIRED: Please provide a reason for overriding this configuration.
error.MISSING_OA_ADMIN_EMAIL: An admin email address is required to provision this organisation.
error.TENANT_KEK_NOT_FOUND: Encryption key not found for this organisation.
error.AT_LEAST_ONE_CHANNEL_REQUIRED: Please enable at least one notification channel.
error.CONFIG_CREATE_FAILED: Failed to save configuration. Please try again.
error.EMPTY_FILE: The file appears to be empty.
error.ARCHIVE_MUST_BE_ZIP: Batch uploads must be a .zip file.
error.INVALID_ZIP: The zip file is corrupted or invalid.
error.SHARE_NOT_FOUND: Share link not found or has expired.
error.SHARE_NOT_ACTIVE: This share link is no longer active.
error.OTP_NOT_REQUIRED: OTP verification is not required for this share.
error.INVALID_OTP: Incorrect OTP. Please check and try again.
error.OTP_REQUIRED: Please verify the OTP before accessing this document.
error.DOCUMENT_NOT_IN_SHARE: This document is not included in the share.
error.EXCEPTION_NOT_OPEN: Only open exceptions can be resolved.
error.REASON_REQUIRED: A reason is required for this action.
error.ELEVATION_ALREADY_ACTIVE: You already have an active elevation.
error.ELEVATION_NOT_PENDING: This elevation is no longer pending.
error.NOT_YOUR_ELEVATION: You can only manage your own elevation requests.
error.WORKFLOW_UNAVAILABLE: Workflow not available. Please try again.
error.ERASURE_ALREADY_PENDING: An erasure request is already in progress.
error.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
error.CONNECTOR_CONFIG_NOT_FOUND: No HRMS connector configured for this organisation.
error.OTP_RATE_LIMITED: Too many OTP requests. Please wait before trying again.
error.OTP_ALREADY_USED: This OTP has already been used. Please request a new one.
error.REGISTRATION_OTP_EXPIRED: OTP expired. Please restart the registration.
error.REGISTRATION_CODE_INVALID: Incorrect code. Please check and try again.
error.EMAIL_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED: Email verification is required. Please complete the OTP step.
error.DPA_REQUIRED: Please accept the Data Processing Agreement to continue.
error.NO_TENANT_OVERRIDE: Platform-level defaults cannot be overridden at tenant level.
error.CHANNEL_NOT_PERMITTED: This notification channel is not permitted for your organisation tier.
error.INVALID_DATE_RANGE: Please provide both from_date and to_date, or leave both empty to use the default period.
error.INFRA_DB_UNAVAILABLE: Database temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
error.INFRA_REDIS_UNAVAILABLE: Cache service temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
error.INFRA_KAFKA_UNAVAILABLE: Event service temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
error.INFRA_S3_UNAVAILABLE: Document storage temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
error.INFRA_KMS_UNAVAILABLE: Encryption service temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
error.INFRA_TEMPORAL_UNAVAILABLE: Workflow service temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
error.INFRA_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
error.DEVICE_LIMIT_REACHED: You've reached the device limit. Remove an old device in Settings first.
error.PUSH_REQUEST_NOT_FOUND: No login request found. This link may have expired.
error.PUSH_REQUEST_STATUS_INVALID: Unexpected login request status. Please try again.
error.PUSH_APPROVAL_FAILED: Approval failed. Try again or deny the request.
error.CONSENT_RECORD_FAILED: Could not record your consent. Check your connection and try again.
error.UPLOAD_FAILED: Upload failed. Check your connection and try again.

success.DOC_UPLOADED: Document uploaded. Processing will begin shortly.
success.SHARE_OTP_VERIFIED: Identity verified. Document is now accessible.
success.EXCEPTION_RESOLVED: Exception resolved. Document will continue processing.
success.ERASURE_REQUESTED: Erasure request submitted. You will be notified within 30 days.
success.EXPORT_REQUESTED: Data export requested. You will receive a link within 72 hours.
success.CONSENT_WITHDRAWN: Consent withdrawn. Processing for this purpose has stopped.
success.GRIEVANCE_SUBMITTED: Grievance submitted. We will acknowledge within 48 hours.
success.ERASURE_CANCELLED: Erasure request cancelled. Your account is safe.
success.CONSENT_GRANTED: Consent granted. Documents from your employers will be processed.
success.TEST_DIGEST_QUEUED: Test digest queued. You will receive it shortly.
success.MARKED_AS_ALUMNI: Marked as alumni. Employer access to this account has been removed.
success.ADMIN_PASSWORD_RESET: Password reset. A temporary password has been sent.

info.PIPELINE_FAILED: Processing failed. Please contact support if this persists.
info.SESSION_EXPIRING_SOON: Your session will expire in {minutes} minutes.
info.SHARE_SESSION_ACTIVE: Secure access active. Expires in {minutes} minutes.
info.SHARE_SESSION_EXPIRING: Your access will expire in {minutes} minutes.
info.RATE_LIMIT_WARNING: You are approaching the request limit. Please slow down.

validation.PHONE_INVALID_FORMAT: Enter a valid Indian mobile number (e.g. +91 98765 43210).
validation.FILE_TOO_LARGE: File size must be under {maxMB} MB.
validation.DATE_IN_PAST: Date cannot be in the past.
validation.DATE_IN_FUTURE: Date cannot be in the future.
validation.PASSWORD_TOO_WEAK: Password must include uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a symbol.
validation.OTP_EXPIRED: This OTP has expired. Request a new one.
validation.OTP_ATTEMPTS_EXCEEDED: Too many incorrect attempts. Please request a new OTP.

pipeline_error.S01_INGEST_DB_INSERT_FAILED: Could not record the document. Please try again.
pipeline_error.S02_ENCRYPT_PAN_NOT_FOUND: Could not detect identity in document.
pipeline_error.S02_ENCRYPT_MULTIPLE_PANS: Multiple identities detected — manual review required.
pipeline_error.S03_SCAN_VIRUS_DETECTED: Document blocked: potential security threat detected.
pipeline_error.S03_SCAN_FORMAT_UNSUPPORTED: File format not supported for scanning.
pipeline_error.S04_EXTRACT_PASSWORD_PROTECTED: Document is password protected. Please unlock and re-upload.
pipeline_error.S04_EXTRACT_LOW_CONFIDENCE: Extraction confidence too low — sent for manual review.
pipeline_error.S04_EXTRACT_DARK_IMAGE: Document image is too dark to read.
pipeline_error.S05_RESOLVE_CROSS_TENANT: Security alert: document belongs to a different organisation.
pipeline_error.S05_RESOLVE_L3_MULTIPLE_CANDIDATES: Multiple employees matched — manual review required.
pipeline_error.S05_RESOLVE_L4_MULTIPLE_CANDIDATES: Multiple matches found — manual review required.
pipeline_error.S05_RESOLVE_UNRESOLVED: Employee could not be identified — sent for review.
pipeline_error.S06_ROUTE_S3_MOVE_FAILED: Could not move document to vault.
pipeline_error.S06_ROUTE_EXCEPTION_QUEUE_FAILED: Could not add to review queue.
pipeline_error.S06_ROUTE_UNCLASSIFIED_QUEUE_FAILED: Could not add to unclassified queue.
pipeline_error.S06_ROUTE_ALREADY_TERMINAL: Document is already in a final state.
pipeline_error.S06_ROUTE_LEGAL_HOLD_BLOCK: Document is under legal hold and cannot be routed.
pipeline_error.S06_ROUTE_CAREER_EVENT_UNKNOWN: Could not determine career event type.

ask_error.QUERY_TOO_LONG: Your question is too long. Please shorten it.
ask_error.PRIVACY_BLOCK: I can share insights about your career but cannot share specific financial figures.
ask_error.RAG_UNAVAILABLE: Ask PRANA is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.

ui.SOMETHING_WENT_WRONG: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ui.NO_INTERNET: No internet connection. Check your network and retry.
ui.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
ui.VAULT_EMPTY: Your vault is empty. Documents pushed by your employer will appear here.
ui.VAULT_DOCUMENT_PROCESSING: This document is being processed. It will be ready shortly.
ui.ACTIVITY_EMPTY: No activity yet. Access and sharing history will appear here.
ui.CAREER_EMPTY: Your career timeline will build as documents are added to your vault.
ui.ASK_PLACEHOLDER: Ask anything about your career documents…
ui.ASK_EMPTY: No conversations yet. Ask anything about your career.
ui.SHARES_EMPTY: No active shares. Create a share link from any document in your vault.
ui.SHARE_OTP_PROMPT: Enter the OTP sent to verify your identity.
ui.DOC_PASSWORD_PROMPT: This document is password protected. Enter the password to view it.
ui.DOC_PASSWORD_SESSION_NOTE: Your decrypted view is active for 10 minutes. Nothing is saved to your device.
ui.UPLOAD_DRAG_DROP: Drag and drop PDF files here, or tap to browse
ui.CONSENT_REQUIRED: Your consent is required before we can process your documents.
ui.ERASURE_WARNING: This will permanently delete your account and all documents. This cannot be undone.
ui.NOTIF_DOC_READY: Your document is ready in the vault.
ui.BIOMETRIC_FAILED: Biometric check failed. Try again or sign in another way.
ui.BIOMETRIC_ENROLLMENT_FAILED: Could not complete enrollment. You can enable this later in Settings.
ui.FILE_PICKER_UNAVAILABLE: Couldn't open file picker. Please try again.
ui.OTP_RESEND_FAILED: Could not resend OTP. Try again.
ui.ACCOUNT_LOCKED_CONTACT: Account locked. Contact support or wait for auto-unlock.
ui.UNLOCK_PROMPT: Enter the document password to continue.
ui.SHARE_CREATE_FAILED: Couldn't create share link. Check your connection and try again.
ui.ACTIVITY_LOAD_FAILED: Failed to load activity. Tap to retry.
ui.EMPLOYER_NOT_REGISTERED: This number isn't linked to a PRANA vault yet. Your employer needs to add you first.
ui.CAREER_LOAD_FAILED: Could not load career data. Try again later.
ui.CHECK_CONNECTION: Check your connection and try again.
ui.VAULT_HEALTH_LOAD_FAILED: Could not load health data. Try again later.
ui.COACHING_EMPTY: Your vault looks great! Check back after adding more documents.
ui.VERIFY_SHARE_PROMPT: Share this code with employers, banks, or visa offices to verify your document
